research_data_question: Historical token circulating supply and max/fully-diluted supply per asset per day
alternative_sources: Exchange filings; project docs; aggregator snapshots
point_in_time_risks: Current snapshots or retrospectively reconstructed charts are not sufficient; need daily point-in-time values as they were knowable on each date
licensing_access_constraints: Commercial subscriptions; redistribution limits; some series gated
required_audit_test: Reconstruct a known historical date and confirm the value equals the contemporaneous published value (no look-ahead from later corrections)

research_data_question: Historical unlock schedules and revision histories (announced, revised, executed)
candidate_primary_sources: Tokenomist; Messari (unlock calendars); Coin Metrics; project governance repos
point_in_time_risks: Announcement vs execution timestamps differ; revisions change the schedule; need both announcement and actual-event times
licensing_access_constraints: Commercial; some contracts not indexed; EVM-only coverage gaps
required_audit_test: For a known unlock, confirm announcement timestamp, revision history, and actual on-chain unlock event all reconcile

research_data_question: Historical perpetual funding rates and exact cash-flow times
candidate_primary_sources: Exchange APIs (Binance, Bybit, OKX); Kaiko; Amberdata; Paradigm(CM) archives
point_in_time_risks: Funding accrues at discrete times; need exact timestamps and the contract specs in force; venue differences
licensing_access_constraints: Exchange ToS; commercial; historical depth limits
required_audit_test: Replay a known funding payment and confirm booked cash flow matches the contract formula at that timestamp

research_data_question: Fixed-expiry futures basis (spot vs perp vs dated future) history
candidate_primary_sources: Exchange/dated-future APIs; Kaiko; Coin Metrics; CME/deribit where applicable
point_in_time_risks: Basis definition must be consistent across maturities; need reliable spot and contract definitions
required_audit_test: Confirm basis sign and magnitude on a known date against an independent price source

research_data_question: Staking reward histories and eligibility (native + liquid staking)
candidate_primary_sources: StakingRewards.com (used by Cong/He/Tang); Dune; validator APIs; Lido/rocketpool dashboards
point_in_time_risks: Staking yield varies by provider and is revised; need point-in-time yield and lock-up terms
licensing_access_constraints: Mostly open; some APIs rate-limited; provider bias
required_audit_test: Reproduce a documented staking-yield figure for a known date and provider

research_data_question: Historical shortability and margin terms per venue/asset
candidate_primary_sources: Exchange margin docs; APIs; Kaiko; Amberdata
point_in_time_risks: Margin/liquidation terms change; need effective dates and liquidation thresholds
required_audit_test: Confirm a known margin change date and liquidation threshold against venue history

research_data_question: On-chain observation publication times and revisions (blocks, addresses, fees)
point_in_time_risks: Block timestamps vs indexer publication; revisions/backfills change history
licensing_access_constraints: Mostly open; rate limits; archival depth
required_audit_test: For a known block, confirm publication time and that no later revision altered the value used

research_data_question: Delisted and failed assets (return series, delisting date, failure cause)
candidate_primary_sources: Exchange delisting notices; Coin Metrics; Artemis; CMC historical
point_in_time_risks: Survivorship bias: must include delisted assets with their last tradable price and date
required_audit_test: Reconstruct a known delisting and confirm the asset's series ends at the correct date with no silent drop

research_data_question: Venue-specific spreads, depth, and impact (order book + trades)
point_in_time_risks: Spreads/depth are venue- and time-specific; need matched venue and timestamp
licensing_access_constraints: Commercial; high cost; depth history limited
required_audit_test: Reproduce a known top-of-book spread and a realized impact estimate for a known trade

research_data_question: Token migrations, redenominations, and contract changes
point_in_time_risks: Contract changes alter asset identity and supply; need effective dates and mapping
licensing_access_constraints: Open but noisy; cross-chain mapping incomplete
required_audit_test: For a known migration, confirm old->new mapping and that supply/price continuity is handled
